examples.title: Algorithm: Deadlock Prevention using Resource Ordering
examples.description: Pseudocode demonstrating deadlock prevention using resource ordering
examples.code:
ALGORITHM PreventDeadlock
INPUT: resourceOrder (array of resource types in order)
OUTPUT: none

BEGIN
 FOR EACH process P
 FOR EACH resource R requested by P
 IF R is not in resourceOrder
 THROW Error "Resource not in order"
 ELSE IF P has not requested all resources before R in resourceOrder
 THROW Error "Resources out of order"
 END IF
 END FOR
 END FOR
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates deadlock prevention using resource ordering. Each process must request resources in the order specified by the resourceOrder array.

examples.title: Python: Deadlock Prevention using Resource Ordering
examples.description: Python implementation of deadlock prevention using resource ordering
examples.explanation: This Python implementation demonstrates deadlock prevention using resource ordering. The `ResourceOrdering` class ensures that each process requests resources in the correct order.

examples.title: C: Deadlock Prevention using Resource Ordering

examples.explanation: This C implementation demonstrates deadlock prevention using resource ordering. The `request_resource` function ensures that each process requests resources in the correct order.
